title: Quorum Mode Governance Rules
description: JSON Schema for governance rules applied to macp.mode.quorum.v1 sessions. See RFC-MACP-0012 Section 4.2.

threshold.description: Override the required_approvals from ApprovalRequest. Type 'n_of_m' uses a raw count, 'percentage' uses a fraction (0-1) of eligible participants, 'weighted' uses a weighted sum of participant weights.

value.description: Threshold value: count for n_of_m, fraction (0-1) for percentage, weighted sum for weighted.

counts_toward_quorum.description: If true, abstentions count toward the participation quorum but not toward approval.

interpretation.description: How abstentions are interpreted for threshold calculation.
